chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 990 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 4498/2021 3.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 08-11-2022 Date of Decision: 08-11-2022 None present on behalf of the Petitioners. O R D E R Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioners are seeking their employment in the Respondents Department on the plot donation basis. None present on behalf of the Petitioners nor any intimation is received; whereas, record reflects that this Petition is pending since 2021 and no efforts have been made to get the matter fixed by filing application for early hearing; whereas, the controversy involved in this Petition has already been decided by the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide Order dated 09.11.2015, passed in Civil Appeals No.19-K to 50-K of 2015 (Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper and others), wherein it has been held that such appointments cannot be allowed on plot donation basis. In view of such position, instant Petition being misconceived and not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
